change.item: Renamed the extension to JT Toast Messages for JED-friendly branding.
Changed the plugin element to jttoastmessages.
Updated namespace, class name, asset names, media destination, and language constants.
Updated the service provider to avoid passing the event dispatcher to the plugin constructor.
Added Joomla update server and changelog URLs to the manifest.
Declared bootstrap.toast as a Web Asset Manager dependency.

note.item: This release is intended for Joomla 6.1.x and PHP 8.3 or newer.
